subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness in His Essence unto His Own Self, ere the manifestation of His attributes and names in the dominion of His creation, that there is none other God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله فی ذاته لذاته قبل ظهور صفاته و اسمائه فی جبروت انشائه بانه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @The Holy Spirit, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
